---
title: "The Jo Lab - Our Team"
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
    page-layout: full
    css: style.css
    anchor-sections: false
---


<center>[**Our Team**]{style="font-size: 24px;"}</center>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r,echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=F, results='asis'}
cat('<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/lipis/flag-icons@7.2.3/css/flag-icons.min.css"/>')
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)

pi <- read_xlsx("data/team.xlsx") %>%
  filter(position == "pi")

icons <- paste0(
  if (!is.na(pi$contact)) paste0('<a href="mailto:', pi$contact, '" style="color:#444;margin-right:10px;"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></a>') else "",
  if (!is.na(pi$linkedin)) paste0('<a href="https://', pi$linkedin, '" style="color:#0077b5;margin-right:10px;"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>') else "",
  if (!is.na(pi$bluesky)) paste0('<a href="https://', pi$bluesky, '" style="color:#0085ff;margin-right:10px;"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i></a>') else ""
)

cat('<center>[**Principal Investigator**]{style="font-size: 24px;"}</center>')
# 1. Open the Quarto wide container
cat(str_glue('
<div style="margin-bottom: 20px; margin-top: 20px;">
  <table class="member-table" style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 30px; background: transparent;">
    <tr>
      <td class="member-photo" style="width: 20%; vertical-align: top; padding-right: 20px;">
        <img src="{pi$photo}" alt="Profile Photo" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 5%;">
      </td>
      <td class="member-info" style="width: 80%; vertical-align: top;">
        <h3 style="margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 5px;">{pi$name} <span class="fi fi-br" style="transform: scale(0.7); display: inline-block;"></span><span class="fi fi-kr" style="transform: scale(0.7); display: inline-block;"></span></h3>
      <div style="margin-bottom: 8px;">{icons}</div>
        <p style="color:#666; font-style:italic; margin-bottom:15px;">{pi$subheading}</p>
        <p style="text-align:justify; line-height:1.5; margin-top:10px;font-size: 16px;">{pi$description}</p>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</div>
'))

```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r,echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=T, results='asis'}
current <- read_xlsx("data/team.xlsx") %>%
  filter(status == "current") %>%
  filter(!position == "pi")

if (nrow(current) > 0) {

cat('<center>[**Current members**]{style="font-size: 24px;"}</center>')
  
for (k in 1:nrow(current)) { 
  
# Build icons string first, then pass to str_glue
current.member <- current[k,]

icons <- paste0(
  if (!is.na(current.member$contact)) paste0('<a href="mailto:', current.member$contact, '" style="color:#444;margin-right:10px;"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></a>') else "",
  if (!is.na(current.member$linkedin)) paste0('<a href="https://', current.member$linkedin, '" style="color:#0077b5;margin-right:10px;"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>') else "",
  if (!is.na(current.member$bluesky)) paste0('<a href="https://', current.member$bluesky, '" style="color:#0085ff;margin-right:10px;"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i></a>') else ""
)

cat(str_glue('
<div style="margin-bottom: 20px; margin-top: 20px;">
  <table class="member-table" style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 30px; background: transparent;">
    <tr>
      <td class="member-photo" style="width: 20%; vertical-align: top; padding-right: 20px;">
        <img src="{current.member$photo}" alt="Profile Photo" style="width: 90%; border-radius: 5%;">
      </td>
      <td class="member-info" style="width: 80%; vertical-align: top;">
        <h3 style="margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 5px;">{current.member$name} <span class="fi fi-{current.member$nation}" style="transform: scale(0.7); display: inline-block;"></span></h3>
        <div style="margin-bottom: 8px;">{icons}</div>
        <p style="color:#666; font-style:italic; margin-bottom:15px;">{current.member$subheading}</p>
        <p style="text-align:justify; line-height:1.5; margin-top:10px;font-size: 16px;">{current.member$description}</p>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</div>
'))


}
} else {invisible(NULL)}
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)

alumni <- read_xlsx("data/team.xlsx") %>%
  filter(status == "alumni") %>%
  filter(!position == "pi") %>%
  arrange(position)

if (nrow(alumni) > 0) {
  cat('<center>[**Alumni members**]{style="font-size: 24px;"}</center>')
  cat('<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin: 20px 0; align-items: start;">')
  
  for (k in 1:nrow(alumni)) {
    alumni.member <- alumni[k,]
    
    icons <- paste0(
      if (!is.na(alumni.member$contact)) paste0('<a href="mailto:', alumni.member$contact, '" style="color:#444;margin-right:10px;"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></a>') else "",
      if (!is.na(alumni.member$linkedin)) paste0('<a href="https://', alumni.member$linkedin, '" style="color:#0077b5;margin-right:10px;"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>') else "",
      if (!is.na(alumni.member$bluesky)) paste0('<a href="https://', alumni.member$bluesky, '" style="color:#0085ff;margin-right:10px;"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i></a>') else ""
    )
    
    cat(str_glue('
    <div style="text-align: center; padding: 10px;">
      <img src="{alumni.member$photo}" alt="Profile Photo"
        style="width: 60%; border-radius: 10%; display: block; margin: 0 auto;">
      <h3 style="margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 5px; font-size: 18px;">
        {alumni.member$name}
        <span class="fi fi-{alumni.member$nation}" style="transform: scale(0.7); display: inline-block;"></span>
      </h3>
      <div style="margin-top: 5px;">{icons}</div>
      <div style="margin-top: 5px;">{alumni.member$subheading}</div>
    </div>
    '))
  }
  
  cat('</div>')
  
} else { invisible(NULL) }
```
